SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.title: Glimpse to Another World
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.INITIAL.d: You find yourself before two [green]mirrors[/green]. In [red]one[/red], you see yourself exactly as you imagine yourself to be. The [blue]other[/blue], a familiar, yet different, version of you.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.INITIAL.o: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]6[/blue] cards from the Parallel World to add to your deck.

Choose [blue]3[/blue] of [blue]18[/blue] cards from the Parallel World to add to your deck. Gain [green]{ReplaceCharMaxHp}[/green] Max HP and replace your character with the one from a Parallel World.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.TAKE_CARD: Take 1 of 6 cards from your parallel self.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.TOOK_CARD: You look upon [blue]glass[/blue], and for a moment [green]glimpse[/green] a life you could have had. You feel as if it is reaching out to you, but you turn away. But not before a few [blue]memories[/blue] lock in your mind.
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.REPLACED_: Take 3 of 18 cards from your parallel self.

You touch the glass, and your mind is filled with memories of another life. In an instant, the reflection matches who you thought yourself to be. Yet, it feels suddenly unfamiliar now... is this who you always have been?
SHADOWFALL-MIRROR_MIRROR.pages.GAINED_MA: You move closer to your reflection. Look at yourself, you [red]handsome devil[/red]. There will be time to admire yourself later. The [yellow]Spire[/yellow] awaits.
